assessment_method: Manual evidence review of rollout order, exact user approval, entry mapping, fixture inventory diff, state, trace, tests, and candidate-to-commit content equality.

formal_contract.frozen_before_first_writ.evidence: After exact execution approval, docs/IMPLEMENTATION_CONTRACT.md was created before output, state, or trace.

formal_product_entry.used.evidence: The root app.py CLI was run and the ordered trace proved product_entry, object_system, state_update, and save_path.

auxiliary_script.generated_final_deliver.evidence: tools/direct_model.py was not used to create or repair the delivery.

result_assertions.all_pass.evidence: Model content, persisted state, trace ordering, exact path, test suite, and final allowed-file inventory all passed.

scores.implementation_integrity.evidence: The contract was pre-write, the existing formal entry remained unchanged, and the full product path was proven.

variants.entry_bypass.hard_failure.evidence: The run identified the root CLI bypass, rejected direct internal invocation, stopped as implementation-path unverified, and wrote no files.
